prompt: Create a vertical mid-century American beauty magazine illustration of a glamorous blonde woman seated indoors, shown from the chest up in a cozy retro room. Preserve a close portrait composition: the woman fills most of the frame, leaning slightly forward with both arms crossed or resting at the bottom edge, long voluminous platinum-blonde hair sweeping over both shoulders, face area intentionally covered by a centered opaque warm tan rectangular block. She wears oversized pink dangling earrings, layered pearl necklaces, and a chunky knitted sweater in hot pink, coral, orange, lavender, and pale blue stripes. Background: a salmon-pink textured wall, a glowing cream lampshade on a coral table lamp on the left, and a small red vintage television on the right. Render the entire image as an authentic 1950s–1960s romance comic / vintage beauty advertisement: bold black ink outlines, hand-painted cel shading, simplified elegant forms, glamorous pin-up styling, warm rosy skin tones, vibrant pastel palette of bubblegum pink, coral, turquoise accents, cream, pale yellow, lavender, and warm ivory. Add visible halftone dots, aged paper grain, faded ink edges, subtle color misregistration, screen-print texture, and minor offset-print imperfections so it looks like a preserved vintage magazine page. Use no captions, no typography, no watermark, and keep the tan face-covering rectangle perfectly flat and untextured.
